narrative:
Sugarcreek 156 (precinct in Greene County) has 2,017 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.7 percentage points.
